title: Deltarune Project
description: This mod adds various elements of Deltarune chapters 1 and 2 to Minecraft. There are many new materials and bosses added to the game.
body: This is the Deltarune Project. This mod adds many bosses and weapons from Deltarune chapters 1 and 2. This includes bosses like Spamton, Lancer, and Jevil and weapons like the Devilsknife, Brave Ax, and Hero's Sword.
